title: Ubik — Page 45
raw_text:
look at all day long.” He gazed at the girl Pat, with her black, 
strong hair and her sensual mouth; in him he felt unhappy 
cravings arise, cloudy and pointless wants that led nowhere, 
that returned to him empty, as in the completion of a 
geometrically perfect circle. 
     “I’ll sign,” Pat said, and reached for the desk pen.
